warnings: Dropped 1 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Staff Only: Penalty Points). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Demonstrates understanding of the role play and defines problem(s) to be solved

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant did not offer a summary of the role play or identify any issues.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant either presented a summary of the role play scenario or identified the problems, but not both.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant both outlined the role play scenario and clearly stated the problems.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant showed a deep understanding of the role play scenario and expertly articulated the problems.

criteria.name: Identifies alternatives and the pro(s) and con(s) of each

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No possible solutions were presented.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Potential solutions were offered, but their advantages or disadvantages were not examined.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A minimum of two potential solutions were provided, with an analysis of their benefits and drawbacks.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Several potential solutions were presented, each with a thorough analysis of its various advantages and disadvantages.

criteria.name: Identifies logical solution and aspects of implementation

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No proposed resolution was put forward.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: A resolution was suggested, but a strategy for putting it into practice was missing.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A sensible resolution was presented, along with a well-formed plan for its execution.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: A practical resolution was developed, complete with an implementation strategy and a clear identification of required resources.

criteria.name: Demonstrates knowledge and understanding of the event knowledge areas: Business Environment / Management Types / Business Finance / Operations / Strategic Management

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No understanding of the specified knowledge areas was shown.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Evidence of understanding was presented for one or two of the knowledge areas.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding was clearly shown for three of the knowledge areas.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding was clearly shown for four or more of the knowledge areas.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) did not appear ready to present.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) were prepared, but the presentation lacked a logical progression.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation followed a coherent and logical order.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation flowed in a logical sequence, and all points were clearly structured.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the listed communication skills were exhibited.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two of the specified communication skills (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the specified communication skills (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All communication skills were demonstrated, significantly enhancing the overall delivery.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant was unable to provide answers to questions.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Answers provided were not fully comprehensive.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: All questions were answered thoroughly.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant engaged with the judges while providing complete answers to all questions.
